<!--
purpose: Standard pull request template — use for all normal changes.
-->

# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What changed, in plain English (1-3 bullets) -->

-
-

## Linked Issue (REQUIRED)

<!-- Use closing keywords. Linked issues must be triage:accepted before merge. -->

Closes #

## Change Type (REQUIRED)

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] ci
- [ ] security

## Risk Assessment

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High / Critical
- Blast radius:
- User-facing impact:

## Rollback Plan (REQUIRED)

<!-- One command or one clearly described action -->

```bash

```

## Validation (REQUIRED)

- [ ] pre-commit run --all-files
- [ ] CI passed
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe below)

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] No new privilege escalation introduced
- [ ] Blast radius evaluated

## Documentation

- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if required)
- [ ] README updated (if required)
- [ ] Docs updated (if required)

## Notes

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know -->
